name: browser_boost
description: BrowserBoost optimizes heavy web applications locally.

scripts.pack:xpi: rm -rf artifacts && pnpm build && web-ext build --source-dir .output/firefox-mv3 --artifacts-dir artifacts --overwrite-dest
scripts.release:firefox: rm -rf artifacts && pnpm build && pnpm lint:ext && web-ext sign --source-dir .output/firefox-mv3 --artifacts-dir artifacts --channel listed --amo-metadata metadata/amo.json --api-key "$AMO_JWT_ISSUER" --api-secret "$AMO_JWT_SECRET"
